title: sphaeroma umbellatum
intro: Sphaeroma umbellatum is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It is also known as the "umbellate sphaeroma" and is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sphaeroma umbellatum include its ability to treat various health issues such as respiratory problems, skin irritations, and gastrointestinal disorders, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for use in herbal remedies.
